dropImage: Drop an image here or click to select
supportedFormats: Supports PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF, BMP, SVG
formatNotSupported: This image format is not supported. Please use PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF, BMP, or SVG.
firstFrameOnly: Animated image — only the first frame is used

descriptions.title: About Image Compressor
descriptions.aeoDefinition: Image Compressor is a free online tool for compressing, resizing, and converting images between PNG, JPG, and WebP formats. All processing runs locally in your browser.
descriptions.whatIs: Compress, resize, and convert images between PNG, JPG, and WebP formats directly in your browser. No data is uploaded to any server — all processing uses the HTML5 Canvas API.
descriptions.step1Text: Drag and drop an image onto the drop zone, or click to browse. Supports PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF, BMP, and SVG input.
descriptions.step2Text: Choose an output format (PNG, JPG, WebP), adjust quality with the slider, and optionally resize by percentage or custom dimensions.
descriptions.step3Text: Compare original vs. compressed side by side. Download the result or copy it directly to clipboard as PNG.
descriptions.useCasesP1: Convert PNG to WebP for smaller file sizes on websites. Adjust quality to balance visual fidelity and bandwidth.
descriptions.useCasesP2: Resize images for social media profiles, email attachments, or documentation screenshots without opening a desktop editor.
descriptions.p1: Compress, resize, and convert images between PNG, JPG, and WebP formats directly in your browser. Extract dominant colors with the [Color converter](/color), or verify image integrity with [File Checksum](/checksum).
descriptions.p2: Supports PNG, JPG, and WebP output formats. WebP offers the best compression ratio for web images.
descriptions.p3: Use the quality slider to balance file size and image quality. Lower quality means smaller files.
descriptions.p4: Copying to clipboard converts the image to PNG format regardless of the selected output format.
descriptions.faq1Q: What can I do with the Image Tool?
descriptions.faq1A: Resize, compress, and convert images directly in your browser. Supports JPEG, PNG, WebP, and BMP formats with adjustable quality and dimensions.
descriptions.faq2Q: Are my images uploaded to a server?
descriptions.faq2A: No. All image processing happens in your browser using the Canvas API. Your images never leave your device.
descriptions.faq3A: Input: JPEG, PNG, WebP, BMP, GIF. Output: JPEG, PNG, WebP. You can convert between formats while adjusting quality.
